data.title: Dogecoin price projected to hit $0.11 in March 2026. Currently at $0.10 with RSI at 44.06. Bullish momentum could push it higher, but bearish MACD indicates caution.
data.description: The value of Dogecoin is currently stable at $0.10 while the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 44.06, indicating a neutral trend. Analysts predict a possible push towards testing the resistance level of $0.11 if a bullish upturn occurs, although the cautionary signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) suggest a bearish undertone.

data.title: Predicted: SOL price to reach $92-$98 by March as bulls battle for control. Short-term target: $87-$90, medium-term: $92-$98. Support at $80.15.
data.description: Summary of SOL Price Prediction: In the short term (1 week), the target price is estimated to be between $87 and $90. Looking ahead to the medium term (1 month), the forecast indicates a range of $92 to $98. The key bullish breakout level is set at $87.59, while critical support stands at $80.15.

data.title: XRP aiming for $1.48 breakout with RSI at 39.93 signaling oversold conditions, bouncing from $1.43 support level.
data.description: Analysis indicates that XRP may experience a rebound from the $1.43 support level, as the Relative Strength Index (RSI) currently stands at 39.93, indicating oversold conditions. The forecast for Ripple suggests a possible breakthrough of the $1.48 resistance level. This prediction highlights the potential for a positive price movement in the near future.

data.title: Cardano price at $0.28 eyes $0.31 resistance with mixed signals: RSI neutral at 44.99. MACD signals caution for ADA bulls.
data.description: Cardano is currently trading at $0.28 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 44.99. Based on technical analysis, there is a potential for the price to reach the $0.31 resistance level. However, bearish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicate caution for ADA bulls.

data.title: BNB price may hit $680-$730 by March 2026 with current trading at $625.38 and RSI at 34.91. Key resistance is $647.
data.description: The current trading price of Binance Coin (BNB) stands at $625.38, accompanied by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 34.91. Analysis predicts that if the key resistance level of $647 is breached, BNB could aim for a range between $680 and $730 by March 2026.

data.title: Ethereum aims for $2,200 recovery by March 2026. Current price at $1,959, with RSI at 34.19. Resistance at $2,012.
data.description: The current price of Ethereum (ETH) stands at $1,959 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 34.19. Analysts point to a potential uptrend towards the $2,200-$2,260 range if the crucial resistance level at $2,012 is breached. However, caution is advised as there are lingering downside risks that could push the price lower.

data.title: Bitcoin price expected to hit $72,000-$75,000 by March with short-term target of $69,500-$72,000 and bullish breakout at $69,453.
data.description: Summary of BTC Price Predictions: In the short term (1 week), the price target for Bitcoin is estimated to be between $69,500 and $72,000. Looking ahead to the medium term (1 month), the forecast suggests a range of $72,000 to $75,000. A bullish breakout point is identified at $69,453. Additionally, there is critical support at another undisclosed level.

data.title: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC probe officers and directors of Synopsys, Inc. for potential misconduct.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, Charles C. Foti, Jr., former Attorney General of Louisiana and now a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed that the law firm has initiated a probe into Synopsys, Inc. The investigation focuses on scrutinizing the activities of the Company.

data.title: Macro economist Lyn Alden predicts Bitcoin could rise with a slight increase in demand, eyeing a possible peak in AI stocks.
data.description: Renowned macroeconomist Lyn Alden suggests that Bitcoin could experience a significant increase with just a slight uptick in new demand. Alden is closely monitoring AI stocks for a potential indication of a peak in the market.

data.title: Stock market rallies as Dow Jones Futures rise; S&P 500 regains 50-day line but faces volatile trading.
data.description: The S&P 500 has recovered the 50-day moving average, showing a positive trend in the market. However, the market remains volatile and challenging to navigate. The Dow Jones Futures are up due to the recent tariff decision by President Trump. Investors are closely watching developments in Iran and the performance of Nvidia. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: OpenAI reduces compute spending target to $600B, projects $280B revenue by 2030. Shift towards more realistic financial planning.
data.description: OpenAI has adjusted its ambitious infrastructure plans, with plans to spend approximately $600 billion on computing power by 2030. This figure is a notable decrease from the previous projection of around $1.4 trillion from CEO Sam Altman. The shift in strategy is aimed at implementing more realistic financial planning as the company expands its artificial intelligence operations. Sources familiar with the matter revealed these details to CNBC. OpenAI is now focusing on aligning its capital investments with projected revenue growth, with expectations of exceeding $280 billion in total revenue by 2030. This revenue is anticipated to come from both consumer and enterprise segments. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: The Cannabist Co. extends forbearance with senior noteholders for 9.25% & 9.00% Senior Secured Notes due Dec 31, 2028.
data.description: A cannabis company in Chelmsford, Massachusetts, The Cannabist Company Holdings Inc., revealed that a group of noteholders of the company's 9.25% Senior Secured Notes and 9.00% Senior Secured Convertible Notes due December 31, 2028, have reached an agreement. The Cannabist Company is known for its cannabis cultivation, manufacturing, and retail operations in the U.S. The noteholders are parties to the settlement concerning the Notes. The company's stock is listed as Cboe CA: CBST and OTCQB: CBSTF.

data.title: Rakovina Therapeutics boosts financing to $2.0M with $1.0M convertible debenture/warrant financing and $1.0M common share placement. Operations support.
data.description: A proposed financing plan includes a $1.0 million convertible debenture and warrant offering, along with a concurrent private placement of common shares totaling up to $1.0 million. These funds are intended to bolster near-term operations.

data.title: Travelers contribute to bring giant tortoises back to Floreana Island after a century, supported by Lindblad Expeditions-National Geographic Fund.
data.description: Over the span of ten years, conservation efforts have been sustained with the help of traveler contributions to the Lindblad Expeditions-National Geographic Fund. A recent development in the restoration of Floreana Island reveals that after over a hundred years, tortoises have been able to thrive once again in their natural habitat. This success marks a significant milestone in the ongoing conservation journey.

data.title: US demand for Brunello di Montalcino increasing, +7.7% volume growth. 48 producers to showcase new vintages in NY and TX.
data.description: A significant 7.7% increase in volume underscores the strong interest from the United States market as 48 producers gear up to showcase their latest vintages in New York and Texas. The renowned Brunello di Montalcino wine maintains its impressive presence, solidifying its status as a top Italian wine in the U.S. market scene.

data.title: Ray Junior Courtemanche launches Champagne Ray Junior distribution in Quebec, an important milestone for the brand.
data.description: In Mirabel, Quebec, on February 20, 2026, Ray Junior Courtemanche has disclosed the introduction of Champagne Ray Junior distribution in Quebec. This milestone signifies a significant step forward for the brand, with the product now available to Quebec consumers through authorized distribution channels.

data.title: Federal Transportation Board preserves 40-mile Fort Bragg–Willits rail line, denying removal request, ensuring continued freight, passenger use. Mendocino Railway promotes collaborative rail-and-trail future.
data.description: In Willits, California, the Surface Transportation Board has rejected a plea to exclude the 40-mile Fort Bragg–Willits rail corridor from the national rail network. This ruling secures the corridor for ongoing freight and passenger operations. The unanimous verdict underscores the corridor's importance within the interstate rail system and acknowledges its value for current and prospective rail services. Robert Jason Pinoli, President, highlighted that the corridor retains its significance as a crucial public asset for Mendocino County.

data.title: KBRA assigns preliminary ratings to $272.8M non-prime RMBS from Angel Oak Mortgage Trust 2026-2 with 585 residential mortgages.
data.description: KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to ten classes of mortgage-backed certificates from Angel Oak Mortgage Trust 2026-2 (AOMT 2026-2), a non-prime RMBS transaction worth $272.8 million. The pool consists of 585 residential mortgages, with a significant proportion being loans underwritten using alternative income documentation. Among these loans, 52.1% are non-qualified mortgages (Non-QM) while the remaining 47.9% are exempt from the Ability-to- Repay/Qualified Mortgage (QM) rule.

data.title: VERSES filed Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for 3 and 9-months ended Dec. 31, 2025 with SEC. Vancouver-based cognitive computing company.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 20, 2026, VERSES AI Inc. (CBOE: VERS) (OTCQB: VRSSF), a leading cognitive computing company, released news that it submitted its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report covers the financial performance for the three and nine months concluding on December 31, 2025.

data.title: KBRA assigns ratings to Aspire Mortgage Trust 2026-1 in a $391.3 million non-prime RMBS transaction with 752 residential mortgages comprising 99.2% FRMs and 0.8% hybrid ARMs.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has given preliminary ratings to eight classes of mortgage-backed notes from Aspire Mortgage Trust 2026-1 (SPIRE 2026-1), with a total transaction value of $391.3 million. The collateral consists of 752 residential mortgages, with 99.2% being fixed-rate mortgages (FRMs) and 0.8% being hybrid adjustable-rate mortgages (ARMs). These loans are categorized as Qualified Mortgages – Safe Harbor (APOR), with most falling under QM: Safe Harbor (A).
